title: Long-term fluorescence live imaging of honeybee embryos using light sheet fluorescence microscopy and halocarbon-based liquids.
author: Netschitailo O Siefert P Middeke MM Golden A Schrod C Beringer T Grunewald B Stelzer EHK Strobl F
content: S-EPMC12505272 PMC12505272 Long-term fluorescence live imaging of honeybee embryos using light sheet fluorescence microscopy and halocarbon-based liquids. The eusocial honeybee Apis mellifera is a key pollinator and model for insect development, offering insights into the evolutionary history
